title: nephrodium dilatatum subsp. tanacetifolium
intro: Nephrodium dilatatum subsp. tanacetifolium, commonly known as Tanacetifolium fern or a fern species, is a type of plant belonging to the Nephrolepis genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Nephrodium dilatatum subsp. tanacetifolium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
